## Summary

- 

## Scope

- [ ] Root client / options
- [ ] Official API `client.API.*`
- [ ] Web `client.Web.*`
- [ ] Addon
- [ ] Request controls / proxy / retry / rate limit
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / release

## Compatibility

- [ ] No public API change
- [ ] Compatible public API addition
- [ ] Behavior change documented below
- [ ] Potential breaking change documented below

Notes:

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `staticcheck ./...`
- [ ] `govulncheck ./...`
- [ ] Not run, explained below

Notes:

## Security and Secrets

- [ ] No real API keys, access tokens, refresh tokens, cookies, proxy passwords, or credential-bearing URLs are included.
- [ ] New logs, errors, examples, or diagnostics avoid printing secrets.
- [ ] URL examples use redaction where relevant.

## Documentation

- [ ] README or docs updated
- [ ] Endpoint coverage updated
- [ ] Addon scope documented
- [ ] Release notes or release checklist updated
- [ ] Documentation not needed
